title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Piramal Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Piramal Finance
jsonLd.description:
Piramal Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Piramal Finance:
Piramal Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Finance!
